kernel_subject: termbits.h: create termbits-common.h for identical bits
stage1_reason: Driver removed CMSPAR ifdefs after kernel commit 6bf08cb246b5 made CMSPAR universally defined across all architectures, indicating adaptation to kernel API standardization.
stage2_reason: Driver commit removes CMSPAR ifdefs after kernel commit 0b46ac44f267 creates termbits-common.h, making CMSPAR universally defined across architectures, enabling driver simplification.
